title: 10 best herbal essential oils for dry nose
description: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, essential oils helps with dry nose because of its natural decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's active compounds, such as thymol and carvacrol, help to reduce swelling and ease congestion in the nasal passages. Additionally, thyme essential oil's antimicrobial properties help to combat underlying infections that may be contributing to dry nose symptoms.
